german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical Roles Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A notable gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, indicating potential constraints in talent accessibility.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the positions are filled by senior professionals, indicating a strong senior-heavy trend.

work_mode.title: Fragmented Work Modes Indicate Uncertain Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remain unclassified, highlighting mixed expectations for remote and on-site work arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: Half of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with nearly half requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Yet Unclassified
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
